raw_data.name: Sincerely Tea House

raw_data.subtypes: Tea house, Event venue, Live music venue

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much! We appreciate you
reviews_data.review_text: This place is such a special treat for Davidson! A cultured tea house that has vinyl nights, poetry, slams, and everything we would want in a tea house that is a true part of the community!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for joining us in our tea house! We hope to see you again soon
reviews_data.review_text: Absolutely beautiful experience. The tea is served with care and appreciation. A peaceful shop with wonderful energy!

reviews_data.owner_answer: We love having you in the tea house Eric! Thank you so much for appreciating and sharing our love of tea! We’ve got matcha and puers waiting for you!
reviews_data.review_text:
Sincerely Tea is my go to spot in downtown Davidson. If you're coming from out of town, this is a must-visit place. The tea is incredible and thoughtfully sourced by Damien, their tea expert. Plus the vibe and experience provide a nice escape from the busyness of life. I come here weekly to slow down, reset, and enjoy a calm, relaxing experience.

Not to mention the owners Sandy and John are the best! They make everyone feel welcome and their passion for tea and caring for people shines through in everything they do.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Marissa, we loved having the Book & Sip group in our tea house! It was a lovely evening! Hope to see you again!
reviews_data.review_text:
We hosted our Charlotte Book & Sip Club tea party social at Sincerely Tea House and had so much fun!

We even did tea leaf reading (tasseography), and Damien was absolutely wonderful so sweet and incredibly knowledgeable. It made the whole experience feel extra special.

We nibbled on delicious desserts, and they were thoughtful enough to provide gluten-free options for us.

It truly felt like the perfect tea party. Highly recommend the Paris tea it was amazing! 💕

Thank you so much!!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much! We loved having your book club at our tea house!
reviews_data.review_text: Damian offered a wondered tasseography tea guided glass for our book club event. Such a wonderful space with delicious tea and snacks!

reviews_data.owner_answer: So glad you enjoyed tea and baked goods at our tea house! Thank you for sharing!!!
reviews_data.review_text: Such a cute and cozy space. Delicious teas and desserts from their bakery are so yummy!! Will definitely come again!!❤️

reviews_data.owner_answer: Yay! We love that you came in for tea and dessert for the event, thank you!
reviews_data.review_text: had a blast! they are very knowledgeable about tea and the different notes. the desserts are very yummy. i loved getting my tea leaves read and i can say i really hope that my fortune does come true!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for coming tonight, we love sharing tea! And so glad you enjoyed it
reviews_data.review_text: My book club did a tea reading here with Damien and it was so much fun!! The tea and treats were delicious. Best part was the service and how we each had such a personal experience with what our leaves told us.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you! We love sharing tea and so glad you enjoyed Paris tea, we agree, it is delicious!
reviews_data.review_text: Such a cute atmosphere with wonderful tea! Had the Paris tea and it was so yummy even for someone who is new to the tea world. The tea reading leaves demonstration was so cool and their knowledge was impeccable of the history of the tea

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for coming in, we love sharing tea! And so glad you enjoyed it!
reviews_data.review_text: Beautiful place! Enjoyed the event I attended here.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you! We appreciate that you enjoyed our tea house and the event! Hope to see you again!
reviews_data.review_text: We had the most lovely tea leaf reading experience. Delicious tea.  Yummy desserts (including gluten free options). While they offer other tea classes and sampling, this experience with the tea leaf reading was top notch!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you! Glad you liked our tea and our vibe! So much appreciation!
reviews_data.review_text: Adorable place - great vibe and friendly workers!  Made me an iced London fog tea 😋 Highly recommend!

reviews_data.owner_answer: We really appreciate your comments, we love sharing tea and are so happy you enjoyed yourself!
reviews_data.review_text: If you have not been to visit Sandy at Serenity Tea, you have missed a unique chance to get away from the stressors of life and find a zen experience for the senses.  Get lost in the calm tranquil world of tea.  Enjoy just being... with the amazing smells, locally displayed art, great company and a moment in time to renew yourself with quietness or conversation.  New to tea?  No problem.  You can receive one on one personal attention to find the right blend.  Sandy never disappoints!  Don't you owe it to yourself to leave all the stressor on the street for some ME TIME. Thank you Sandy for what you bring to the community of Davidson.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for coming in and enjoying tea with us!
reviews_data.review_text:
Absolutely loved this tea house! The atmosphere is peaceful and beautifully designed — the perfect place to relax and unwind. The tea selection is impressive, with so many unique and high-quality options to choose from. Everything was fresh, fragrant, and served with care.

The owner was welcoming, attentive, and knowledgeable, helping us pick the perfect tea. You can really feel the passion they have for what they do. It’s a wonderful spot whether you want a quiet moment alone or a cozy place to catch up with friends.

Highly recommend for anyone who appreciates great tea and a calming ambiance. We will definitely be coming back!
Forget coffee, it’s TEA TIME!!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for coming in! We loved having you, and John loves talking about playing guitar! It as lovely meeting you both!
reviews_data.review_text:
We had an amazing experience at Sincerely Tea House!

This place is so much more than just a tea shop — it’s an immersive and educational experience. You can really feel the artistry and intention behind everything they do.

The staff was incredibly welcoming, knowledgeable, and kind, which made the experience even better. The owner even played guitar during our visit, adding such a unique and personal touch. We’re already planning to come back for their live music nights on Thursdays and Saturdays (plus they often many other events as well).

The tea was excellent and paired perfectly with their delicious pastries.

Highly recommend checking out this rare gem!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Nina! We love having you in our tea house and sharing tea, we appreciate your review! Hope to see you guys again soon!
reviews_data.review_text: This is a great experience! The owners have done a great job making this not only a place to get delicious tea, but to make it a cozy learning experience. The teas are unique and cozy, and a large pot is a very fair price.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Debra! We are so glad you enjoyed your tea experience here! Hope to see you again soon!
reviews_data.review_text: This was the most relaxing, cathartic experience ever! It is so beautiful and calm, and John really loves what he does! It is such an art and I loved witnessing it in action! 100/10 will definitely go again!!

reviews_data.owner_answer: It was lovely meeting you and your husband! Thanks very much from coming in, sharing tea and listening to music with us!
reviews_data.review_text: Beautiful and peaceful ambience. The tea was great. The owner playing the guitar was a great storyteller and played unique pieces that he wrote his wife was so very kind and easy to talk to.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you! We love sharing fine tea and appreciate you enjoying tea with us!!
reviews_data.review_text: I can't say enough good things about this tea house!  If you're local, this should be your regular spot to study, work, relax with a book, or laugh with friends.  If you're visiting, don't miss the chance to enjoy some tea while being treated like family.  Don't like tea?  Go anyway!

reviews_data.owner_answer: We are so happy you had a nice time at our tea house - we really appreciate your comments! Thank you!
reviews_data.review_text:
We had a really nice time!!
The tea was delicious.
The owners were very friendly.
The setting was very cozy and laid back, but the tea was served with a respect to traditional tea house formality.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for coming in and we are really happy you enjoyed our warm matcha! Hope to see you again soon
reviews_data.review_text: If you enjoy cozy coffee shops you will certainly enjoy the ambiance of this Super comfortable environment with plenty of table space and even a few cushioned fabric chairs and a small couch to simply chill out and enjoy the freshly made tea while you work, read a book, or simply slow down for a while and unwind  i lHad a really great tasting hot matcha tea with almond milk and honey served table side

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much - it was lovely meeting you and sharing tea - John loves to play guitar when people are in to enjoy it! We appreciate you coming in and relaxing
reviews_data.review_text: The tea selections, quality, atmosphere, friendliness of staff & the music all combine to a create a genuinely unique experience. John & Sandy provide a relaxing, stress free & super cool environment!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Kathy! It was really nice to meet and talk with you, and John loved playing guitar for you guys! It’s always a lot of fun to share tea and music!
reviews_data.review_text: What a wonderful surprise to find this quaint tea shop to relax and listen to music.  The selection of tea is outstanding as well as the owners !

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you! We can’t wait for you to come back in for tea and we would love to see what you are knitting!
reviews_data.review_text: The matcha was fantastic, and I am excited to try more of the FIFTY TEAS they offer! The owners are super sweet, the couches are comfy, and it feels like a very chill, welcoming environment. I'll definitely be back soon with my knitting!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Yay! We are so glad you like our teas, thanks for the compliments! Much appreciation!
reviews_data.review_text: A wonderful selection of tea, run by wonderful people. Delicious!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you! We love having you in to sip tea!
reviews_data.review_text: This place is great!

reviews_data.owner_answer: It was lovely to meet you, Ruth! We are so happy you came in and enjoyed our tea - we love sharing tea! Look forward to seeing again!
reviews_data.review_text: What a wonderful new place that just opened on Main Street in Davidson!  It's a whole experience of smells and flavor, everything a tea house should be!  And a new, family-owned, local business.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Connie for the kind review. Please stop by again anytime you’re in Davidson! It was a please sharing some time and some tea with you! ❤️
reviews_data.review_text: We came on a Saturday evening and found that this is not just a tea house, it's an experience that touches every one of your senses and pleasantly lingers in your mind well after you leave.  As you climb the stairs, you're greeted by the beautiful guitar music of the talented John Kotch and a stereo system that envelopes you with soft yet rich high fidelity sound.  You're then introduced to an array of exotic tea blends, each with an intoxicating scent and complex taste.  The presentation of brewing and pouring the tea is visually appealing.  The desserts are also a must have to complete a truly enjoyable experience.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for coming in for the LKN Chamber of Commerce event today! We appreciate you and we are really happy you enjoyed the tea tastings! We hope to see you back again! Thanks!
reviews_data.review_text: I visited Sincerely Tea House for a ribbon cutting and tea tasting and absolutely loved it. The space feels calm and welcoming, and the owners are so friendly and knowledgeable about tea. We sampled several loose-leaf blends and each one had its own unique flavor and story. This is a wonderful spot to slow down, enjoy a thoughtfully prepared cup of tea, and connect with friends right in downtown Davidson. Highly recommend stopping in if you are anywhere near Main Street.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Chris! It was great to meet you and see your sister Nicole in the tea house yesterday! We’re really happy you enjoyed our Warm Spice - you’re right, perfect weather for it here in Davidson! Safe travels home and hope to see you again some time
reviews_data.review_text:
As a 40+ year (I'm 58, joined the U.S. Army at 18) two cups/day "Coffee Bro," I was pleasantly surprised with my visit to Sincerely with my sister.
I chose the Warm Spice tea, and received a generous portion, that was brewed in front of me at the table. It smelled great and tasted better, activated all of my taste buds, and really warmed me up on a very chilly "Black Friday" walking around Davidson.
Definitely worth a visit if you've never been.
My Grade: T (for Tearrific 😉)

reviews_data.owner_answer: We love that you love our Peppermint Patty & Warm Spice Teas! Thank you John! Davidson rocks!
reviews_data.review_text: We discovered this tea shop and shared a couple pots of tea after a walk into town.  The Peppermint Patty and Warm Spice teas hit the spot on a cold day.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Emily! We are so happy you enjoyed your tea with us! We welcome you back for Vinyl Night, a Tea Tasting or to relax with a pot of tea any time!
reviews_data.review_text: Absolutely lovely! Great tea, very knowledgeable servers, and a beautiful relaxing space. We came around 10:30 when it was quiet but we will plan to come again for vinyl night or a tea flight tasting.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Kendall!! Best guests ever!!!
reviews_data.review_text: The best tea experience ever!

reviews_data.owner_answer: We are so happy you enjoyed the tea house today! Thank you for coming in and we can't wait to see you again! Damien had a great time going through teas with you!
reviews_data.review_text: What a lovely spot!! It’s upstairs and so cozy and clean. We did a tea tasting and had an incredibly enjoyable and informative time. Teas were lovely and we bought some to take home! Wonderful life music that was the perfect conversation volume. Can’t wait to come back and experience some of their events!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Regina! It was wonderful having you all in to the tea house for a tea tasting -  Damien had so much fun and we are so happy you enjoyed it!
reviews_data.review_text: Damian is a tea aficionado.  Great afternoon with the girlfriends sipping six different types of tea.  Great experience all around!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much Josephine for coming in with your son - we enjoyed spending time with you and serving Warm Spice Roobois to you both! It is a delight to meet such amazing people right here in Davidson and we can’t wait to see you and Roman again! Tea is a wonderful way to share time together and we look forward to many special moments in the tea house
reviews_data.review_text:
Every once in a while, you visit a place & people that immediately feel like home. I grew up in a household that had tea every afternoon. And that extended to my aunt‘s and my grandmother‘s house.

I took my son to his first High Tea experience at a young age, and he absolutely loved it and is still devoted to tea.

We live in the town of Davidson and our son was home from university, and walking in the evening and met one of the owners and he invited us up and I am so glad we did it! This family owned an operated tea house is beyond special!
Sandy is a delight! Damien seems so sweet as well. Don’t expect to just pick up a tea in a cup to go! Take your time and savor the moment. Share a pot of tea. My son Roman and I had the Roobois. It was like nothing I had ever tasted. And the honey was perfection & sourced from local hives in or near town. It’s for sale, definitely take some home. They also offer locally baked treats.

I have already shared Sincerely Tea House on our subdivision Facebook page here in Davidson. And I plan to put it on more of my socials. They are worth a million shares!

According to reviews:

Their tea tasting experience is a must!

They also do a very high quality matcha!

And for those that have special occasions in mind—do the High Tea!

Happy Exploring,

Josephine Local Guide

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much Kayla - we really appreciate your compliments on our tea service and our excitement to share tea!
reviews_data.review_text: What a delightful place! The hosts were so eager to help us find exactly the right tea, and our server was equally skilled and charming. I’ll definitely be back; perfect place for out of towners to be introduced to the Davidson vibe.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Michelle, so happy you chose to spontaneously celebrate your birthday with us sharing tea ✨ It is lovely to know you!
reviews_data.review_text:
Happened upon this gem while strolling downtown Davidson, NC
Popped up to check it out as a spontaneous part of my birthday celebration.
Nice vibe, knowledgeable staff, interesting teas, and the ceremony/intentions from the owners is one of a kind.

reviews_data.owner_answer: We loved having you! And can’t wait to see you again!
reviews_data.review_text:
WOW! I went here last night with a friend. We showed up right at 7, and were welcomed in with a gentle enthusiasm. It was an amazing experience from start to finish. The service was top tier - Damien's knowledge of tea and their passion were inspiring and showed through in every interaction we had with them.

The space was perfect. Very cozy. Plenty of seating, but not crowded, and beautifully designed.

Of course, the tea was also so good. We loved the small, meaningful interactions with Damien at the table during steeping and serving. So cool. I will be returning often! Thanks for the great experience!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks Sienna! We love having you and making matcha!
reviews_data.review_text: My college friends and I really like coming here. I'm not a big tea person, but they do have really good matcha (better than Summit). It's very quiet so it is a nice place to study. They also have a student discount which nice in comparison to other places on main street that don't have one at all.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks Greg! You are always welcome at the tea house!
reviews_data.review_text: Really cool vibe!! I loved this place and the family that runs it is so sweet. The interior is really well done and the tea is so good for a great price!! Will definitely be returning. A great addition to downtown davidson.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks for your wonderful comment Dilan! We look forward to seeing you at the tea house again soon!
reviews_data.review_text:
In a world where everything feels rushed—fast food, fast lines, fast service—finding a place that helps you slow down is a rare gem. The experience here was unlike anything I’ve had before. The service felt truly personal and heartfelt, not just unique but memorable.

This family-run spot is especially inspiring because it was their son’s idea—he discovered his passion at an early age, and it shines through in every detail. You can tell they take their work seriously, treating guests with genuine care.

If you’re looking for more than just a drink—if you want an experience shaped by passion, warmth, and authenticity—this is the place. To top it off, they even have live acoustic music, which makes the atmosphere even more special.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks Halle! Come back whenever you can!
reviews_data.review_text: Wonderful tea and wonderful people. I enjoyed going here and will definitely be back! Felt like a personalized experience.

reviews_data.owner_answer: We love sharing tea with you, Michelle! Thank you for coming in!
reviews_data.review_text: A proper tea shop that I felt right at home in. Whether you *know* tea or not, it will be a great experience!

reviews_data.owner_answer: We are so happy you enjoyed your tea tasting and discovered new types that you may not have known about. We love to share tea and talk about the background, regions and aromas of different teas! It is a fun journey to experience from our side as well!
reviews_data.review_text: So glad we tried the tea tasting.  We were able to try several teas and it was so neat to see how it might have smelled one way but tasted so different.  I ended up loving a white and a green tea, which I would never have thought I would like.  We even got to listen to live music on the guitar and the sweetest love song he wrote for his wife.  Highly recommend for tea fans and especially for those who think they are not tea fans, you will leave with a newfound appreciation and love of tea.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much, we love that you enjoyed your tea and the space we share to drink it! We appreciate you!
reviews_data.review_text: The scent of tea hits you when you walk up the stairs, it's so good. The music is nice, the tea is wonderful, the staff are welcoming, and the atmosphere is perfect.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Audrey! We can't wait to see you again and share more teas and tea talk!
reviews_data.review_text: A really beautiful space with delicious teas. If you haven't tried pure teas before (white, green, oolong, pureh, etc) then this is the place to try it. It's also a lovely space to just hang out in. The owners are incredibly sweet people. This is what the community needs!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks for your wonderful comment Chelsea! The tea tasting experience is our flagship and it was a pleasure serving you and your friends!
reviews_data.review_text: I went with a group of friends to do a tea tasting!  It was such an amazing experience. It was a great way to taste a number of teas and find a favorite or two!  We got to watch the tea being made for the tasting and learn about the different blends. I even ordered the porch light tea (aka their version of sweet tea) which they made table side. It was the best sweet tea I have ever had!  Davidson is very lucky to have this gem on Main Street.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks Davis, it is great to know you enjoyed our teas - we love serving tea, and can't wait to see you again!
reviews_data.review_text: Lovely new family run business! The tea selection is amazing and the service (and conversation!) was top notch. Highly recommend coming here if you enjoy tea, or want to dip your toes into trying it. It’s a perfect “third place” that isn’t just another coffee shop. Fantastic job y’all!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Aaron - lovely having you & your family in for tea!
reviews_data.review_text: The tea was excellent. We had the Warm Spice chai and Agua de Jamaica. Great atmosphere with John playing the guitar and local artists’ work on the walls. Really enjoyable. We’ll be sure to come back and bring others.

reviews_data.owner_answer: We are so happy you enjoyed our tea house Bonny! Thanks!
reviews_data.review_text: This tea shop is an absolute gem! There is an amazing selection of teas from around the world. The baked goods are delicious and pair perfectly with the teas, and the cozy, welcoming atmosphere makes it the perfect spot to relax. I’ll definitely be coming back often!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much Kerry! We are overwhelmed by your kind words and can’t wait to see you again!
reviews_data.review_text:
If you’re looking for your new favorite spot in Davidson, Sincerely Tea House is it. This isn’t just a tea shop...it’s an experience.

From the moment you walk in, you’re greeted by a warm, quaint atmosphere that feels both intimate and welcoming. Soft lighting, cozy seating, and the gentle hum of conversation create the perfect backdrop for an afternoon escape. And then there’s the music. The live acoustic guitar, with its subtle classic rock notes, is pure magic. It turns a great cup of tea into a full sensory experience.

The tea menu itself is a masterpiece, carefully curated with blends that are as beautiful to look at as they are to sip. Whether you lean toward floral, earthy, or bright and citrusy, there’s something here that will steal your heart.

One of the best surprises? The space is designed for connection. There’s plenty of table room for board games, chess, or gathering with friends. It’s the kind of place where you can lose track of time in the best possible way.

In short: Sincerely Tea House combines artisan tea, cozy charm, incredible live music, and a social, community-driven vibe. Whether you’re flying solo with a book, gaming with friends, or soaking in the music, this place is a must-visit. Davidson is lucky to have it.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks Dug! We love having you here and can’t wait to share more tea!
reviews_data.review_text: Amazing new addition to downtown Davidson! Laid back vibe and the wonderful tea makes you want to just hang out all day. This family owned tea house hasn’t had their official grand opening yet, but are open for business now and the plan is to have live music, shows for local artists, and games. Can’t wait to go back!

The staff was incredibly welcoming, knowledgeable, and kind, which made the experience even better. The owner even played guitar during our visit, adding such a unique and personal touch. We’re already planning to come back for their live music nights on Thursdays and Saturdays (plus they often many other events as well).

The tea was excellent and paired perfectly with their delicious pastries.

Highly recommend checking out this rare gem!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Nina! We love having you in our tea house and sharing tea, we appreciate your review! Hope to see you guys again soon!
reviews_data.review_text: This is a great experience! The owners have done a great job making this not only a place to get delicious tea, but to make it a cozy learning experience. The teas are unique and cozy, and a large pot is a very fair price.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Debra! We are so glad you enjoyed your tea experience here! Hope to see you again soon!
reviews_data.review_text: This was the most relaxing, cathartic experience ever! It is so beautiful and calm, and John really loves what he does! It is such an art and I loved witnessing it in action! 100/10 will definitely go again!!

reviews_data.owner_answer: It was lovely meeting you and your husband! Thanks very much from coming in, sharing tea and listening to music with us!
reviews_data.review_text: Beautiful and peaceful ambience. The tea was great. The owner playing the guitar was a great storyteller and played unique pieces that he wrote his wife was so very kind and easy to talk to.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you! We love sharing fine tea and appreciate you enjoying tea with us!!
reviews_data.review_text: I can't say enough good things about this tea house!  If you're local, this should be your regular spot to study, work, relax with a book, or laugh with friends.  If you're visiting, don't miss the chance to enjoy some tea while being treated like family.  Don't like tea?  Go anyway!

reviews_data.owner_answer: We are so happy you had a nice time at our tea house - we really appreciate your comments! Thank you!
reviews_data.review_text:
We had a really nice time!!
The tea was delicious.
The owners were very friendly.
The setting was very cozy and laid back, but the tea was served with a respect to traditional tea house formality.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for coming in and we are really happy you enjoyed our warm matcha! Hope to see you again soon
reviews_data.review_text: If you enjoy cozy coffee shops you will certainly enjoy the ambiance of this Super comfortable environment with plenty of table space and even a few cushioned fabric chairs and a small couch to simply chill out and enjoy the freshly made tea while you work, read a book, or simply slow down for a while and unwind  i lHad a really great tasting hot matcha tea with almond milk and honey served table side

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much - it was lovely meeting you and sharing tea - John loves to play guitar when people are in to enjoy it! We appreciate you coming in and relaxing
reviews_data.review_text: The tea selections, quality, atmosphere, friendliness of staff & the music all combine to a create a genuinely unique experience. John & Sandy provide a relaxing, stress free & super cool environment!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Kathy! It was really nice to meet and talk with you, and John loved playing guitar for you guys! It’s always a lot of fun to share tea and music!
reviews_data.review_text: What a wonderful surprise to find this quaint tea shop to relax and listen to music.  The selection of tea is outstanding as well as the owners !

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you! We can’t wait for you to come back in for tea and we would love to see what you are knitting!
reviews_data.review_text: The matcha was fantastic, and I am excited to try more of the FIFTY TEAS they offer! The owners are super sweet, the couches are comfy, and it feels like a very chill, welcoming environment. I'll definitely be back soon with my knitting!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Yay! We are so glad you like our teas, thanks for the compliments! Much appreciation!
reviews_data.review_text: A wonderful selection of tea, run by wonderful people. Delicious!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you! We love having you in to sip tea!
reviews_data.review_text: This place is great!

reviews_data.owner_answer: It was lovely to meet you, Ruth! We are so happy you came in and enjoyed our tea - we love sharing tea! Look forward to seeing again!
reviews_data.review_text: What a wonderful new place that just opened on Main Street in Davidson!  It's a whole experience of smells and flavor, everything a tea house should be!  And a new, family-owned, local business.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Connie for the kind review. Please stop by again anytime you’re in Davidson! It was a please sharing some time and some tea with you! ❤️
reviews_data.review_text: We came on a Saturday evening and found that this is not just a tea house, it's an experience that touches every one of your senses and pleasantly lingers in your mind well after you leave.  As you climb the stairs, you're greeted by the beautiful guitar music of the talented John Kotch and a stereo system that envelopes you with soft yet rich high fidelity sound.  You're then introduced to an array of exotic tea blends, each with an intoxicating scent and complex taste.  The presentation of brewing and pouring the tea is visually appealing.  The desserts are also a must have to complete a truly enjoyable experience.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for coming in for the LKN Chamber of Commerce event today! We appreciate you and we are really happy you enjoyed the tea tastings! We hope to see you back again! Thanks!
reviews_data.review_text: I visited Sincerely Tea House for a ribbon cutting and tea tasting and absolutely loved it. The space feels calm and welcoming, and the owners are so friendly and knowledgeable about tea. We sampled several loose-leaf blends and each one had its own unique flavor and story. This is a wonderful spot to slow down, enjoy a thoughtfully prepared cup of tea, and connect with friends right in downtown Davidson. Highly recommend stopping in if you are anywhere near Main Street.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Chris! It was great to meet you and see your sister Nicole in the tea house yesterday! We’re really happy you enjoyed our Warm Spice - you’re right, perfect weather for it here in Davidson! Safe travels home and hope to see you again some time
reviews_data.review_text:
As a 40+ year (I'm 58, joined the U.S. Army at 18) two cups/day "Coffee Bro," I was pleasantly surprised with my visit to Sincerely with my sister.
I chose the Warm Spice tea, and received a generous portion, that was brewed in front of me at the table. It smelled great and tasted better, activated all of my taste buds, and really warmed me up on a very chilly "Black Friday" walking around Davidson.
Definitely worth a visit if you've never been.
My Grade: T (for Tearrific 😉)

reviews_data.owner_answer: We love that you love our Peppermint Patty & Warm Spice Teas! Thank you John! Davidson rocks!
reviews_data.review_text: We discovered this tea shop and shared a couple pots of tea after a walk into town.  The Peppermint Patty and Warm Spice teas hit the spot on a cold day.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Emily! We are so happy you enjoyed your tea with us! We welcome you back for Vinyl Night, a Tea Tasting or to relax with a pot of tea any time!
reviews_data.review_text: Absolutely lovely! Great tea, very knowledgeable servers, and a beautiful relaxing space. We came around 10:30 when it was quiet but we will plan to come again for vinyl night or a tea flight tasting.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Kendall!! Best guests ever!!!
reviews_data.review_text: The best tea experience ever!

reviews_data.owner_answer: We are so happy you enjoyed the tea house today! Thank you for coming in and we can't wait to see you again! Damien had a great time going through teas with you!
reviews_data.review_text: What a lovely spot!! It’s upstairs and so cozy and clean. We did a tea tasting and had an incredibly enjoyable and informative time. Teas were lovely and we bought some to take home! Wonderful life music that was the perfect conversation volume. Can’t wait to come back and experience some of their events!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Regina! It was wonderful having you all in to the tea house for a tea tasting -  Damien had so much fun and we are so happy you enjoyed it!
reviews_data.review_text: Damian is a tea aficionado.  Great afternoon with the girlfriends sipping six different types of tea.  Great experience all around!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much Josephine for coming in with your son - we enjoyed spending time with you and serving Warm Spice Roobois to you both! It is a delight to meet such amazing people right here in Davidson and we can’t wait to see you and Roman again! Tea is a wonderful way to share time together and we look forward to many special moments in the tea house
reviews_data.review_text:
Every once in a while, you visit a place & people that immediately feel like home. I grew up in a household that had tea every afternoon. And that extended to my aunt‘s and my grandmother‘s house.

I took my son to his first High Tea experience at a young age, and he absolutely loved it and is still devoted to tea.

We live in the town of Davidson and our son was home from university, and walking in the evening and met one of the owners and he invited us up and I am so glad we did it! This family owned an operated tea house is beyond special!
Sandy is a delight! Damien seems so sweet as well. Don’t expect to just pick up a tea in a cup to go! Take your time and savor the moment. Share a pot of tea. My son Roman and I had the Roobois. It was like nothing I had ever tasted. And the honey was perfection & sourced from local hives in or near town. It’s for sale, definitely take some home. They also offer locally baked treats.

I have already shared Sincerely Tea House on our subdivision Facebook page here in Davidson. And I plan to put it on more of my socials. They are worth a million shares!

According to reviews:

Their tea tasting experience is a must!

They also do a very high quality matcha!

And for those that have special occasions in mind—do the High Tea!

Happy Exploring,

Josephine Local Guide

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much Kayla - we really appreciate your compliments on our tea service and our excitement to share tea!
reviews_data.review_text: What a delightful place! The hosts were so eager to help us find exactly the right tea, and our server was equally skilled and charming. I’ll definitely be back; perfect place for out of towners to be introduced to the Davidson vibe.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Michelle, so happy you chose to spontaneously celebrate your birthday with us sharing tea ✨ It is lovely to know you!
reviews_data.review_text:
Happened upon this gem while strolling downtown Davidson, NC
Popped up to check it out as a spontaneous part of my birthday celebration.
Nice vibe, knowledgeable staff, interesting teas, and the ceremony/intentions from the owners is one of a kind.

reviews_data.owner_answer: We loved having you! And can’t wait to see you again!
reviews_data.review_text:
WOW! I went here last night with a friend. We showed up right at 7, and were welcomed in with a gentle enthusiasm. It was an amazing experience from start to finish. The service was top tier - Damien's knowledge of tea and their passion were inspiring and showed through in every interaction we had with them.

The space was perfect. Very cozy. Plenty of seating, but not crowded, and beautifully designed.

Of course, the tea was also so good. We loved the small, meaningful interactions with Damien at the table during steeping and serving. So cool. I will be returning often! Thanks for the great experience!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks Sienna! We love having you and making matcha!
reviews_data.review_text: My college friends and I really like coming here. I'm not a big tea person, but they do have really good matcha (better than Summit). It's very quiet so it is a nice place to study. They also have a student discount which nice in comparison to other places on main street that don't have one at all.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks Greg! You are always welcome at the tea house!
reviews_data.review_text: Really cool vibe!! I loved this place and the family that runs it is so sweet. The interior is really well done and the tea is so good for a great price!! Will definitely be returning. A great addition to downtown davidson.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks for your wonderful comment Dilan! We look forward to seeing you at the tea house again soon!
reviews_data.review_text:
In a world where everything feels rushed—fast food, fast lines, fast service—finding a place that helps you slow down is a rare gem. The experience here was unlike anything I’ve had before. The service felt truly personal and heartfelt, not just unique but memorable.

This family-run spot is especially inspiring because it was their son’s idea—he discovered his passion at an early age, and it shines through in every detail. You can tell they take their work seriously, treating guests with genuine care.

If you’re looking for more than just a drink—if you want an experience shaped by passion, warmth, and authenticity—this is the place. To top it off, they even have live acoustic music, which makes the atmosphere even more special.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks Halle! Come back whenever you can!
reviews_data.review_text: Wonderful tea and wonderful people. I enjoyed going here and will definitely be back! Felt like a personalized experience.

reviews_data.owner_answer: We love sharing tea with you, Michelle! Thank you for coming in!
reviews_data.review_text: A proper tea shop that I felt right at home in. Whether you *know* tea or not, it will be a great experience!

reviews_data.owner_answer: We are so happy you enjoyed your tea tasting and discovered new types that you may not have known about. We love to share tea and talk about the background, regions and aromas of different teas! It is a fun journey to experience from our side as well!
reviews_data.review_text: So glad we tried the tea tasting.  We were able to try several teas and it was so neat to see how it might have smelled one way but tasted so different.  I ended up loving a white and a green tea, which I would never have thought I would like.  We even got to listen to live music on the guitar and the sweetest love song he wrote for his wife.  Highly recommend for tea fans and especially for those who think they are not tea fans, you will leave with a newfound appreciation and love of tea.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much, we love that you enjoyed your tea and the space we share to drink it! We appreciate you!
reviews_data.review_text: The scent of tea hits you when you walk up the stairs, it's so good. The music is nice, the tea is wonderful, the staff are welcoming, and the atmosphere is perfect.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Audrey! We can't wait to see you again and share more teas and tea talk!
reviews_data.review_text: A really beautiful space with delicious teas. If you haven't tried pure teas before (white, green, oolong, pureh, etc) then this is the place to try it. It's also a lovely space to just hang out in. The owners are incredibly sweet people. This is what the community needs!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks for your wonderful comment Chelsea! The tea tasting experience is our flagship and it was a pleasure serving you and your friends!
reviews_data.review_text: I went with a group of friends to do a tea tasting!  It was such an amazing experience. It was a great way to taste a number of teas and find a favorite or two!  We got to watch the tea being made for the tasting and learn about the different blends. I even ordered the porch light tea (aka their version of sweet tea) which they made table side. It was the best sweet tea I have ever had!  Davidson is very lucky to have this gem on Main Street.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks Davis, it is great to know you enjoyed our teas - we love serving tea, and can't wait to see you again!
reviews_data.review_text: Lovely new family run business! The tea selection is amazing and the service (and conversation!) was top notch. Highly recommend coming here if you enjoy tea, or want to dip your toes into trying it. It’s a perfect “third place” that isn’t just another coffee shop. Fantastic job y’all!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Aaron - lovely having you & your family in for tea!
reviews_data.review_text: The tea was excellent. We had the Warm Spice chai and Agua de Jamaica. Great atmosphere with John playing the guitar and local artists’ work on the walls. Really enjoyable. We’ll be sure to come back and bring others.

reviews_data.owner_answer: We are so happy you enjoyed our tea house Bonny! Thanks!
reviews_data.review_text: This tea shop is an absolute gem! There is an amazing selection of teas from around the world. The baked goods are delicious and pair perfectly with the teas, and the cozy, welcoming atmosphere makes it the perfect spot to relax. I’ll definitely be coming back often!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much Kerry! We are overwhelmed by your kind words and can’t wait to see you again!
reviews_data.review_text:
If you’re looking for your new favorite spot in Davidson, Sincerely Tea House is it. This isn’t just a tea shop...it’s an experience.

From the moment you walk in, you’re greeted by a warm, quaint atmosphere that feels both intimate and welcoming. Soft lighting, cozy seating, and the gentle hum of conversation create the perfect backdrop for an afternoon escape. And then there’s the music. The live acoustic guitar, with its subtle classic rock notes, is pure magic. It turns a great cup of tea into a full sensory experience.

The tea menu itself is a masterpiece, carefully curated with blends that are as beautiful to look at as they are to sip. Whether you lean toward floral, earthy, or bright and citrusy, there’s something here that will steal your heart.

One of the best surprises? The space is designed for connection. There’s plenty of table room for board games, chess, or gathering with friends. It’s the kind of place where you can lose track of time in the best possible way.

In short: Sincerely Tea House combines artisan tea, cozy charm, incredible live music, and a social, community-driven vibe. Whether you’re flying solo with a book, gaming with friends, or soaking in the music, this place is a must-visit. Davidson is lucky to have it.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks Dug! We love having you here and can’t wait to share more tea!
reviews_data.review_text: Amazing new addition to downtown Davidson! Laid back vibe and the wonderful tea makes you want to just hang out all day. This family owned tea house hasn’t had their official grand opening yet, but are open for business now and the plan is to have live music, shows for local artists, and games. Can’t wait to go back!

raw_data.subtypes: Tea house, Event venue, Live music venue
